ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 10/06/2026 at counsel's request.
EXAMINER: AERO FETH

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Meera Balat appeared via zoom for Phillip Cifarelli (petitioner).

Ms. Balat stated that they will be filing an ex-parte to waive accounting. The matter is continued to July 7, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.
